description: react-tooltip pr-1275: with openOnClick, clicking an anchor whose own click handler calls stopPropagation() fails to open the tooltip, because the library listens for clicks at the document level during the bubbling phase; clicking the anchor must open the tooltip even when propagation is stopped (real react-tooltip issue)
